## `@ai-sdk/pixelart` — new provider package

### Package structure (mirrors `@ai-sdk/fal`)

```
packages/pixelart/
├── package.json             – npm package (@ai-sdk/pixelart v1.0.0)
├── tsconfig.json            – project references to provider + provider-utils
├── tsconfig.build.json      – tsup build variant (composite: false)
├── tsup.config.ts           – CJS + ESM + dts build, injects __PACKAGE_VERSION__
├── turbo.json               – extends root turbo config
├── vitest.node.config.js    – node test runner
├── vitest.edge.config.js    – edge-runtime test runner
└── src/
    ├── index.ts                        – public barrel exports
    ├── version.ts                      – VERSION constant (injected at build)
    ├── pixelart-image-settings.ts      – PixelArtImageModelId union type
    ├── pixelart-image-options.ts       – Zod schema for provider options
    ├── pixelart-error.ts               – JSON error response handler
    ├── pixelart-image-model.ts         – PixelArtImageModel (ImageModelV3 impl)
    ├── pixelart-provider.ts            – createPixelArt factory + pixelArt default
    ├── pixelart-image-model.test.ts    – image model unit tests
    └── pixelart-provider.test.ts       – provider factory unit tests
```

### Key design decisions

| Feature | Detail |
|---|---|
| **Factory** | `createPixelArt(options?)` returns a `PixelArtProvider` |
| **Default instance** | `pixelArt` pre-configured from `PIXELART_API_KEY` env var |
| **Base URL** | `https://api.pixelart.ai/v1` → endpoint `POST /images/generate` |
| **Image models** | `pixelart-v1`, `pixelart-v1-fast`, `retro-art-v1`, `8bit-art-v1` |
| **Image settings** | `style: 'pixel' \| 'retro' \| '8bit'` · `pixelDensity: 1–32` passed via `providerOptions.pixelart` |
| **Size** | `"WxH"` string decomposed into `width`/`height` request fields |
| **No text/embeddings** | `languageModel()` and `embeddingModel()` both throw `NoSuchModelError` |
| **Response format** | API returns `{ images: [{ b64_json, width, height, style, pixel_density }] }` — decoded to `Uint8Array` directly (no secondary download) |
| **Auth** | `Authorization: Bearer <key>` header with user-agent suffix |
